query:
SELECT 
  customerName,
  customerExternalId,
  COUNT(*) AS service_count,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyCost), 2) AS monthly_cost,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue), 2) AS monthly_revenue,
  ROUND(SUM(monthlyRevenue - monthlyCost), 2) AS monthly_margin,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT serviceType ORDER BY serviceType SEPARATOR ', ') AS service_types
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'Telstra'
  AND status IN ('archived', 'flagged_for_termination')
GROUP BY customerName, customerExternalId
ORDER BY monthly_cost DESC
LIMIT 20;
